feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MM
entry.content: How to write FS document in SAP and Please if someone has sample FSD share to this ***removed by moderation*** mail I'd.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
Hi Dinu,

Thank you for the reply,

When i tested with your code I am getting a different result, please see the screen shot

First context should repeat it self based on second input count number

if count value in second context is 1 then repeat 1 time

if count value in second context is 5 then repeat 5 times

if count value in second context is 3 then repeat 3 times

Thanks

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite "the page you are looking for is currently unavailable."
entry.content:
I am doing this training : Developing with SAP Integration Suite, using BTP Free Tier.

In lesson Creating an API when I test the API I get this response:

<h1>An error occurred.</h1> <p>Sorry, the page you are looking for is currently unavailable.<br/> Please try again later.</p>

It happen in Task 1: Create an API -> 4 Explore Resources View API -> step 5: Choose the Try out button. on Resources try out 

same as in step

Task 2: Test the API -> step 7: Now, choose the Send button on the bottom right of the screen.

Thank you.

entry.title: Need Help with CPI mapping
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need help/direction to achieve the following in SAP CPI Mapping.

In the Source <Item> node (Occurences 0...Unbounded) we have following segments at the same level

G_HL_gq_O
G_HL_gq_T
G_HL_gq_P
G_HL_gq_I

We have populated E1EDL24 for each G_HL_gq_O
Now , there is a field under //G_HL_gq_I/S_SN1/D_382 , we need to sum up all the values from //D-382 before the next G_HL_gq_O
and pass to target //E1EDL24/LFIMG .

Please suggest how can this be achieved.

entry.title: Need help with SAP CPI iflow
entry.content: Message mapping not returning expected response. The target response is not having items array.

entry.title: SAP CPI Merge different payloads to single
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a scenario where I need to merge the response of api call to input payload.  Please  suggest how this can be achieved.

InputPayload (Json) -> convert to xml -> use message mapping to map the input payload fields to api fields -> trigger api call -> response returned is in xml format (add it to the InputPayload ??)

entry.title: java.io.IOException: Attempted read from closed stream
entry.content:
Good day,

We have setup new integrations on Integration Suite which connect to Success Factors API via API Management.

We get the following error when the integration runs on schedule (intermittently):

java.io.IOException: Attempted read from closed stream

We are unable to pin point or reproduce the error in our QA environement.

Has anyone experienced or resolved this issue before?

Regards,

Brandon

entry.title: HTTP receiver adapter - inbuilt retry option
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The below is our current BTP Integration Suite version.

We do not get inbuilt retry option/feature in HTTP receiver adapter like shown below.

Could you pls suggest what needs to be done to get this feature enabled on HTTP receiver adapter?

Like shown in below screenshot, "Retry Failed requests" should be enabled in HTTP receiver adapter.

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: How to get the an item description in excel without have login in SAP
entry.content:
I hope to be in the right community for this question.

 

I'd like to open an excel file and I'd like to write a code item in a certain column and I'd like to get the description in the next column.

Would be perfect to list a certain number of item codes and then only one time actualize the next column obtaining all the descriptions at the same time.

In case a way exists,  please can you also explain me how to login excel with the SAP user?

entry.title: Read a JMS queue with a timer event
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I would like to know, if is it possible to read data from a JMS queue with a timer?
I want to run my JMS queue receiver flow daily, but I cannot connect the sender to a timer event. I want the data to be stored in JMS queue until the timer run the receiver flow.

This is what my receiver flow looks like right now...

Regards.

entry.title: BTP Free Tier SAP Integration Suite (CPI) Cloud Foundry Trial Provision gets stuck then fails
entry.content:
Activacting capabilites Cloud Integration, 

Tenant provisioning is in progress and may take up to 60 minutes

I have already 3 hours no change.

entry.title: Azure devops pipeline to upload to GITHub
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Has anyone tried to upload their iFlows to Git using Azure Devops pipeline?

entry.title: 401 authorization error while calling the CPI service from POSTMAN and SOAP UI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Up until this past weekend, everything was going well with my SAP Cloud connection login and admin access. However, for the past two days, I've been receiving 401 authorization errors when attempting to contact the CPI services using POSTMAN and SOAP UI.

Kindly help me to understand what am i missing here (password rest also done but still same issue).

Regards,

entry.title: How can you search Future dated onboardees (new hires) in DRM?
entry.content: WE have just implemented ONB 2.0. Any Future dated onboardees (new hires) are not showing in DRM.

entry.title: Integrate an external task system to Cloud ALM.
entry.content:
Hi Community Members,

I am trying to integrate an external system(Rev-Trac) to Cloud ALM. I am trying to create a request in Rev-Trac whenever a requirement is created in Cloud ALM. I have set up a subscription, webhooks and mapping in Cloud ALM but I somehow keep getting a 502 BAD_GATEWAY error from External API management console in Cloud ALM.

here is my configuration:
Subscription:

WebHook:

Mapping:

Example mapping:

{
"_information": {
"_version": "1",
"_source": "SAP Cloud ALM",
"_destination": "RevTrac_Dingo",
"_name": "SAP Cloud ALM Task to Rev-Trac Dingo",
"_comment": ""
},
"structure": {
"request": {
"fields": {
"summary": "#{title}",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"project": {
"key": "#{@USER_VAR(projectId)}"
},
"labels": [
"#{workstream}"
],
"assignee": {
"accountId": "632adf49234d44d406cf77bb"
}
}
},
"response": {
"displayUrl": "#{self}",
"externalNumber": "#{key}",
"externalId": "#{id}"
}
},
"eventTypeMapping": {
"_comment": "Specific event type mapping",
"operationMappings": [{
"eventType": "TASK.CREATED",
"operation": "POST",
"responseRoot": "",
"externalIdProperty": "/id"
},
{
"eventType": "TASK.UPDATED",
"operation": "PUT",
"responseRoot": "",
"path": "/#{@CLOUD_ALM_EXTERNAL_ID}",
"structure": {
"request":
{
"fields":
{
"description":
{
"type": "doc",
"version": 1,
"content":
[{
"type": "paragraph",
"content":
[{
"text": "Project ID: #{projectId} Status: #{status} #{description} updated",
"type": "text"
}]
}]
}
}
},
"response": {
"ticketUpdated": true
}
}
},
{
"eventType": "TASK.PING",
"operation": "GET",
"responseRoot": "",
"path": "/#{externalId}",
"structure": {
"response": {
"displayUrl": "#{self}",
"externalNumber": "#{key}",
"externalId": "#{id}",
"externalStatus": "#{fields.status.name}",
"lastUpdatedAt": "#{fields.updated}",
"createdAt": "#{fields.created}",
"lastUpdatedBy": "",
"createdBy": "#{fields.creator.displayName}",
"assignedTo": "#{fields.assignee.displayName}"
}
}
},
{
"eventType": "TASK.DELETED",
"operation": "DELETE",
"responseRoot": "",
"path": "/#{@CLOUD_ALM_EXTERNAL_ID}"
}]
}
}

here is the error in the console:

 

This mapping was an example and I think the problem lies here. Any help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Integration Suite trial - cannot access API proxy
entry.content:
I am trying to create API proxy, as described in training journey (based on SAP sample provider SAP_GW_SAMPLE - API GWSAMPLE_BASIC).

The Provider itself works well (returns code 200 on testing). When I try to create API proxy - appropriate API is discovered all right.

But on testing created API (eg. using Try out Resources)- I get an error 404: Sorry, the page you are looking for is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

My best guess would be that my own trial account is what's unavailable (direct access to SAP_GW_SAMPLE returns appropriate results), but I do not know why. I have actually (recently) done this and it worked, but now I had to delete the service and re-create it - and now I can't re-create actual exercises... Possibly my account is missing something, but I have no idea what...

entry.title: Activate API - Provider API to Create Freight Order for Subcontracting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I need to activate the standard API for Provider API to Create Freight Order for Subcontracting.

api.sap.com/api/TransportationOrderRequest_Out/overview

Kindly explain me how to do it.

 

Regards,

Tamilselvan

entry.title: Transcation codes in S4HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,
We are moving to S4. Following tcodes were being used in ECC. How do we know whether the same tcodes will be available in S4 also? Please guide if there is any place we can check their counterparts.

SE80
SICF
WSADMIN
WSCONFIG
SLDAPICUST
SXMB_ADM_BPE
SMICM
SOAMANAGER
SLDCHECK
SM58
SMQ1
SMQ2
SPROXY
SXMB_ADM
SM37
SMQ3
ST22
SBWP
SU53
/IWBEP/ERROR_LOG
/IWBEP/ERROR_LOG_E2E
/IWBEP/TRACES
/IWBEP/VIEW_LOG
/IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP
/IWFND/ERROR_LOG
/IWFND/TRACES
SRTIDOC
SRTLOG_E2E
SRT_ADMIN
SRT_CHANGE
SRT_DISPLAY
SRT_LOG
SRT_MONI
SRT_MONIS
SRT_SEQ_MONITOR
SRT_TEST
SRT_TOOLS
SRT_UTIL
SXMB_MONI
SOST
SXI_MONITOR
SXMSIF
/IWBEP/SB
SEGW
BD87
WE02
WE09
WE05
WE07
WE20
WE21
WLF_IDOC
SXMB_MONI_BPE
/IWBEP/CACHE_CLEANUP
/IWXBE/ERROR_LOG

entry.title: What is the right SAP MARA field to map with CPI LifeCycleStatusCode (ERP_COD_MATMAS_CFS)?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Which SAP MARA field should we map to the CPI field "LifeCycleStatusCode" (ERP_COD_MATMAS_CFS) in order to replicate SAP Material statuses to C4C?

Currently, all materials replicated from SAP appear as Active in C4C, regardless of their status in SAP. 

Current mapping MARA - (LVORM) ------- mapping/ERP_COD_MATMAS_CFS to LifeCycleStatusCode. We do not maintain LVORM filed in SAP. 

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: How to get Binary Value from Partner Directory via Groovy
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I currently have a problem that I could not find out exactly how I can read a binary value from the Partner Directory via a Groovy Script ( inside the I-Flow).

Writing, updating and reading the binary value via Postman works as desired, here I have stored the XML as Base64 in the Partner Directory

{
    "Pid":"{{ _.pd_pid }}",
    "Id":"TEST",		
		"ContentType":"xml",
"Value":"PHJvb3Q+CiAgICA8Y3VzdG9tZXI+CiAgICAgICAgPEN1c3RvbWVySUQ+dGVzdDwvQ3VzdG9tZXJJRD4KICAgICAgICA8Q3JlZGVudGlhbF9FVkVOVE0+dGVzdDwvQ3JlZGVudGlhbF9FVkVOVE0+CiAgICA8L2N1c3RvbWVyPgo8L3Jvb3Q+"
}

i followed this methods to get the data in the groovy script: 

https://help.sap.com/doc/471310fc71c94c2d913884e2ff1b4039/Cloud/en-US/com/sap/it/api/pd/BinaryData.html#getData-- 

Here would be my approach how I would have read the binary value in my Groovy script

				//get Value from PartnerDirectory
				paramValue = partnerDirectoryService.getParameter(paramName, callerPID , com.sap.it.api.pd.BinaryData);
				if (paramValue == null){
					throw new IllegalStateException(paramName + " is not configured in " + paramName + " in Partner Directory");
				}
				
				
                message.setProperty("Test1", paramValue);
				message.setProperty("Test2_Data", paramValue.getData());
				message.setProperty("Test3_ContentType", paramValue.getContentType());

Reading a ContentType (with getContentType()) works fine, but it seems that a binary value is read in a strange way.

Here are the output of the Output of the Binary Value: 

com.sap.esb.pd.rt.external.BinaryDataImpl@5568b8e8

Does anyone have an idea what my error is or has an example code for me?

 

Many thanks in advance.

Best regards

Chris. P.
